items.prompt: computes bounded rate of change or slope from tables, graphs, or contextual data
items.expected_evidence: compute bounded rates of change from tables, graphs, or contextual data
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner computes the rate of change accurately and associates it with the correct quantities.

items.prompt: explains how a constant rate corresponds to linear growth and how direction and steepness relate to slope
items.expected_evidence: explain how a constant rate corresponds to linear growth
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner explains slope or rate of change through coherent linear-growth meaning.

items.prompt: Diagnose a peer error aligned to sign_direction_confusion.
items.expected_evidence: compare graphs or tables by direction and steepness using rate language
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner identifies how the peer misread direction, sign, or growth behavior.

items.prompt: succeeds across symbolic, table, verbal, graph, and simple contextual linear-growth representations
items.expected_evidence: connect proportional growth and signed change to slope meaning in bounded cases
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner preserves rate-of-change meaning across varied representations and contexts.
